2026-05-09.explanation: Jetton is TON's standard term for a custom token or fungible token issued on the blockchain, similar to ERC-20 tokens on Ethereum.

options.A: A custom token built on the TON blockchain
options.B: A type of smart contract validator
options.D: A hardware wallet compatible with TON

2026-05-09.question: In TON ecosystem terminology, what is a 'jetton'?
